g.text: Your drone chirps — it detected a brief energy signature, but it faded.
Arrived at Frozen Jets. Food: 98% (-2) | Water: 97% (-3) | Suit: 100% (-0) | Battery: 78% (-7)
Hot vapor rises from dozens of vents. The ice here is thin and treacherous.
No new locations found within scanner range.
No new signatures in range. Try moving to a different location.
